[FRAMEWORK: PROS/CONS — Apply the Pros/Cons + Recommendation framework. Provide three labeled sections: **PROS** (3-5 bullet points making the strongest case for the proposal), **CONS** (3-5 bullet points making the strongest case against), **RECOMMENDATION** (your call with one paragraph of reasoning). Steelman both sides — don't strawman the side you disagree with.]
